SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 05

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AYALA, JUAN JR. RAQUEL AYALA AKA RAQUEL ORTIZ THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 125 GLADSTONE DR, STAYED UNTIL NOV-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, MIDNIGHT - NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT, DAMAGES, ATTY FEES; KEEPS SEC DEP/ LAST MO'S RENT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. PROPERTY LEFT AFTER 11-15-94 DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DEFTS VACATE ON TIME, PLTF WILL SET ASIDE JDMT & DISMISS.

05 BENSON/HOLMES: C/C FOR SETTL CONF HRG. ATTY STEVEN A MACDONALD FOR PLTF. DEFTS JUAN AYALA & RAQUEL AYALA (AKA ORTIZ) IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED - JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFTS. PLTF TO PREPARE JDMT.
